vocab.meaning: trung tâm sinh hoạt cộng đồng
vocab.example: We often frequent communal hubs like libraries or local parks to engage in productive study sessions together.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí sôi động, náo nhiệt
vocab.example: I’m particularly drawn to pedestrian streets because of the vibrant atmosphere they offer during the weekends.

vocab.meaning: người hướng ngoại, thích giao thiệp
vocab.example: While I’m not exactly a social butterfly, I do enjoy meeting my core group of friends in bustling public squares.
Shopping malls in prime locations serve as the perfect meeting point when we can’t decide where else to go.
Visiting art galleries allows us to build shared experiences and discuss our differing interpretations of the exhibits.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: Sometimes we prefer to dive into the hustle and bustle of the night market to soak up the local energy.
The abundance of urban amenities in the city center makes it incredibly convenient for large group hangouts.

vocab.meaning: thắt chặt/củng cố mối quan hệ
vocab.example: Spending quality time in recreational areas really helps to solidify bonds between friends who haven't met in a while.

vocab.meaning: môi trường thanh bình, yên tĩnh
vocab.example: If we want to have a deep conversation, we usually opt for a serene environment like a botanical garden.
A leisurely stroll along the lakefront is our go-to activity when we want to unwind after a stressful week.
